items.question_text: Under 8-9-1, the Pacific ICAO Region ATC service follows the general oceanic procedures in Chapter 8 except when different procedures are prescribed in a directive or _____.
items.explanation: Per 8-9-1, the general Chapter 8 procedures apply with the same directive/LOA superseding exception.

items.question_text: Under 8-9-1, which ICAO region does Section 9 cover?
items.explanation: Per 8-9-1, Section 9 covers the Pacific ICAO Region.

items.question_text: Under 8-9-2, vertical separation in the Pacific ICAO Region follows Chapter 4, Section _____, with Pacific-specific provisions.
items.explanation: Per 8-9-2, vertical separation follows Chapter 4, Section 8.

items.question_text: Under 8-9-3, longitudinal separation in the Pacific ICAO Region follows Chapter 8, Section _____, with Pacific-specific provisions including the Mach number technique.
items.explanation: Per 8-9-3, longitudinal separation follows Section 3 with Pacific-specific Mach number technique applications.

items.question_text: Under 8-9-4, lateral separation in the Pacific ICAO Region follows Chapter 8, Section _____, with region-specific provisions.
